nodes.label: UEM Architect Color Logo (Mark Only, Large)
nodes.description: UEM Architect brand mark without text. Abstract logomark composed of three shapes on a white background: a dark navy-blue curved leaf/arc shape on the left, a medium steel-blue curved leaf/arc shape on the right, and a light sky-blue ellipse at the bottom center. Color palette aligns with brand tokens: navy (#2b4570), blue (#00b4d8), and sky (#90e0ef). No wordmark present — icon only. Larger variant suitable for high-visibility or display use.
